documents.title: Deploy Dify with Docker Compose - Dify Docs

chunk_records.content:
Deploy Dify with Docker Compose
Install Dify with Docker Compose for a self-hosted deployment. Run docker compose up -d after you configure the required environment variables.

Docker Compose troubleshooting
If a docker compose deployment fails during install, check the container logs, review the compose file, and confirm your server environment.

Environment Variables
Reference for self-hosted deployments. Set environment variables such as CONSOLE_API_URL and other backend configuration values before startup.

documents.title: Configure the Chunk Settings - Dify Docs

chunk_records.content:
Configure the Chunk Settings
Adjust delimiters, maximum chunk length, and chunk overlap to split a knowledge base into stable chunks.

Chunk settings guidance
The chunk mode cannot be changed once the knowledge base is created. You can still tune chunk settings to improve retrieval quality.

documents.title: Specify the Index Method and Retrieval Settings - Dify Docs

chunk_records.content:
Specify the Index Method and Retrieval Settings
Choose indexing and retrieval settings for a knowledge base. Higher quality indexing can improve how chunks are matched.

Knowledge base retrieval
Use retrieval settings to balance accuracy and speed when searching knowledge base chunks.

API
Integrate your Dify workflows anywhere. Use the API from your backend service and create API credentials from API Access.

API credentials
Generate API credentials and call Dify from your backend application instead of exposing keys in frontend code.
